pkgmetadata.longdescription: [[pre-commit.ci status](httpsresults.pre-commit.cibadgegithubfuncx-faasfuncx-commonmain.svg)](httpsresults.pre-commit.cilatestgithubfuncx-faasfuncx-commonmain) funcx-commonThis package contains common utilities for use across various funcX projects.For example, constants shared between the funcX service and the funcX SDK aredefined here (and may be re-exported by the SDK).
